caption: A man with a distinctive, tall, silver-colored hairstyle and glasses is seated in a studio setting. He wears a white long-sleeved shirt, a red bowtie, and light-colored suspenders, with black headphones over his ears. He is positioned in front of a professional black microphone. The background consists of a wall adorned with numerous framed photographs. To the right, a white garment bag is visible. On-screen graphics appear in the lower portion of the scene, including a logo that says "BOSS TALK 101" and a smaller badge that reads "PODCAST." Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, his expression shifting slightly as he speaks, with his mouth opening and closing in a conversational manner. The camera remains static, focusing on his upper body as he interacts with an unseen interlocutor.
